summary.intent: Fix flaky E2E test failures in the moltis project across multiple test suites (agents, node-selector, sessions) by identifying root causes and applying targeted fixes.
summary.outcome: Fixed the agents.spec.js race condition in waitForWelcomeOrNoProvidersCard helper. Two additional failures (node-selector SSH label and sessions fork delete dialog) were identified but left unresolved when the context limit was hit.

repo: The welcome card UI has a race condition: showWelcomeCard renders #noProvidersCard first, then refreshWelcomeCardIfNeeded swaps it for #welcomeCard once models load (sessions.js:1116)
E2E tests run via scripts/local-validate.sh with a [local/e2e] label, using Playwright against a live local server
Test artifacts (screenshots, videos, traces) are written to crates/web/ui/test-results/ with path names derived from test titles
Node selector state is managed in crates/web/src/assets/js/stores/node-store.js and rendered via crates/web/src/assets/js/components/session-header.js
The node-selector test expects #nodeComboLabel to show 'SSH: deploy@box' but receives 'Local', suggesting the injected SSH target is not being picked up during test setup

code.finding: waitForWelcomeOrNoProvidersCard helper had a race condition: it would grab #noProvidersCard during a brief render window before the card was replaced by #welcomeCard. Fix: prefer waiting for #welcomeCard with 5s auto-retry, only fall back to no-providers branch if welcome card never materializes.

Test asserts #nodeComboLabel shows 'SSH: deploy@box' but receives 'Local' — the injected SSH target is not reflected in the node combo label at assertion time, suggesting async initialization or store hydration issue.

Test expects no confirmation dialog when deleting an unmodified fork, but the dialog appears (count=1 instead of 0). The 'is modified' check for fork sessions may be incorrectly evaluating the session as modified.

workflow: Running a single spec file (npm run e2e -- --grep) is faster for iterating on a specific failing test than running the full suite
Playwright trace files (trace.zip) can be inspected with 'npx playwright show-trace' for detailed failure debugging
When a test failure references a line number that doesn't match the current file, the run predates the local fix — compare line numbers to confirm

friction: Context limit was hit mid-debugging, cutting off investigation of node-selector and sessions failures
The local-validate.sh script runs the full suite (~3-4 minutes) making iteration slow when chasing multiple independent failures
Pasted terminal output from previous runs (before fixes landed) caused confusion about whether fixes were effective — line numbers in error output vs current file were mismatched
open_items: node-selector.spec.js:45 — 'node selector renders injected ssh target distinctly' still failing: #nodeComboLabel shows 'Local' instead of 'SSH: deploy@box'; needs investigation of node-store.js hydration and session-header.js binding

sessions.spec.js:623 — 'deleting unmodified fork skips confirmation dialog' still failing: delete confirmation modal appears when it should not; needs investigation of fork modification detection logic
agents.spec.js fix is uncommitted — needs to be committed and pushed
